reviews.review_description:
This was fun! It's a simple concept so you get the gist immediately and can have fun sending your friends to the lava. The little cry when you fall is so funny 😂
I do get a bit dizzy with the continuous movement but I'm sensitive so if you're used to it it's probably fine
Fast-paced VR multiplayer action with strong interaction design. Punchy feedback and clean readability make every match feel intense and satisfying!💣🔥
